title: January 21st, 2022
body:
lyrics

oh you fell asleep ha
oh you had a dream ha
it was deep ha
you wanna journal it ha
but the words don't fit ha
turned over and quit ha
thought it was lit til your eyes opened a bit ha
guess you had to be there ha
that was a trip ha
might have to get up to get down to try it again ha
you was flyin ha
you wasn't lyin ha
you sleep on your feet so you don't die in the sheets ha
tie dyin the streets ha
it wasn't me it was the guy in the vw
said he was drivin east ha
he didn't know it leaked ha
you swallowed the tail but didn't follow the trail ha
now you feel stuck and don't know where to go ha
but it ain't the grave or the grail ha
you grow up while you fail ha
people laughed when you fell you didn't take it too well ha
you smile and don't tell ha
you proud of your poker face ha
you let it out when you're saying grace ha
you gotta be found to be saved ha
the stares are they way up
you wanna try it again ha
you had a dream ha
you gotta be found to be saved ha
the stares are they way up
you wanna try it again ha
you had a dream ha
the stares are the way up
you gotta be found to be saved

autistic union***

collective negotiation for accommodations

the dictionary of us and them

people - us

enemy - them

weaponization - handling or changing something so as to shift power from them to us

defense - things we do to stop or mitigate their attacks against us

lyrics

we're looking for justice
not it just was
or it's just about to be
